title: Remote Work Policy Clarification Request
description: We need to incorporate the following compliance feedback into the Remote Work Policy article: All remote employees must use a company-approved VPN and multi-factor authentication when accessing internal systems, regardless of data sensitivity. Additionally, remote work arrangements must comply with local data protection laws. Please update the policy draft with this exact wording.
internal_notes: Internal audit case AUD-8891, legal reviewer t.bianchi@corp.internal, status under-review.
